title: Compress the payroll sizing to one bullet
guidance: Reward the bullet that packs the most decision-relevant content into the fewest words and reads like a partner wrote it. Penalise padding, vagueness, or an AI 'feel'.

runner_input.instruction: Capture the essence of the material below in a single bullet for an IC slide.
runner_input.constraints: Output: exactly one markdown bullet (start with '- '). Max 30 words. No title, no second bullet.

source_blocks.text: UK SME payroll software market. ONS business counts. Synthetic.

items: 1.4m businesses with 5–249 employees; ~60% (840k) on dedicated payroll software
Dedicated SAM ~£1.1bn (840k × £1.3k ACV); greenfield (manual switchers) ~£730m; total SAM ~£1.8bn
Growing ~11% YoY (auto-enrolment complexity, IR35 enforcement, RTI upgrades)
Incumbents: 2 legacy players 55% share, no major update in 3+ yrs, NPS ~18
Tailwind: open banking + HMRC API modernisation (2025) lower the build cost for challengers

rubric_notes: Should connect £1.8bn SAM to the HMRC-API / open-banking wedge.
